name: The Augmented

specials.name: Reckless Attack
specials.description: The creature can gain advantage on all attacks, however every attack against it will be at advantage

specials.name: Unrelenting
specials.description: If this creature uses an additional action to Strike the same target, it does not take a multiple attack penalty for that Strike, but it takes a -5 circumstance penalty to AC until the start of its next turn

specials.name: Ability
specials.description: % explodes in a 30-foot emanation before reconstituting. % rolls a number of d6 damage (determined by the GM) and takes that damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a DC 19 Reflex save. On a failure, a creature takes acid damage equal to the amount rolled; on a critical failure, it instead takes the maximum possible damage. The maximum possible damage can’t exceed %’s current Hit Points, and the number of d6 rolled can’t exceed %’s Hit Points divided by 6 (rounded up). %'s AC is considered 10 and loses all resistances until the start of its next turn

specials.name: Unstable Mutation
specials.description: The first time this creature would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, it instead remains at 30 Hit Points. It takes a –3 circumstance penalty to AC, gains resistance 2 to all damage, and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to attack rolls. Additionally, all actions and abilities with the **unstable mutation** trait become available, while all actions and abilities with the **sentient** trait are suppressed.

specials.name: Attack of Opportunity
specials.description: When a creature leaves %'s melee range, it can make a fist attack against them

specials.name: Acidic Blood
specials.description: Whenever this creature is damaged by a Melee Attack, the attacker takes 1D6 acid damage

description: An evolution to The Infected, the formula used appears to be more stable, giving the individual more draconic features; However the formula is still unstable, given time % becomes nothing more than a mass of flesh and void, writhing at anything nearby
